summary: Tested theme consistency, gamification API, gallery pricing API with session participant info, profile page with gamification UI components. All backend APIs pass (7/7). Frontend themes work correctly - cards use semantic CSS classes (bg-card, bg-background, text-foreground), bottom nav has no white bar in dark/beach modes.

theme_consistency_settings.all_themes_working: Light, Dark, Beach modes all render correctly

bottom_nav_themes.beach_mode: PASS - Uses bg-black (rgb(0,0,0)), no white bar
bottom_nav_themes.dark_mode: PASS - Uses bg-zinc-900, no white bar
bottom_nav_themes.light_mode: PASS - Uses bg-white (expected for light theme)

profile_page.note: Test user has 0 XP and no badges, so gamification section not visible (expected behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: Settings.js correctly uses semantic Tailwind classes (bg-background, bg-card, text-foreground) that reference CSS variables for theme consistency
BottomNav.js uses theme context to dynamically set background classes based on current theme (bg-white for light, bg-black for beach, bg-zinc-900 for dark)
Profile.js correctly imports and displays XPDisplay and BadgeRow from GamificationUI when user has XP/badges
Gallery pricing API includes all necessary fields for live session price override feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme implementation uses CSS custom properties with semantic Tailwind classes. The gamification API returns empty badges/0 XP for users without activity - this is expected behavior. Gallery pricing API includes is_session_participant and related fields for live session price override feature.
